positive: A stylized, highly detailed celestial forest scene. The composition is centered and circular, featuring glowing bioluminescent flora and mythical, abstract crystalline trees with strong silhouettes. Focus on deep contrast: deep indigo and midnight blue background contrasted sharply with vibrant magenta, electric cyan, and glowing gold highlights. The artwork should resemble a cohesive, modern graphic illustration with thick, clean linework and ethereal energy motifs, suitable for seamless textile printing. Elements include cosmic dust swirls, lunar crescent accents, and stylized glowing fauna silhouettes. Art Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets Vaporwave illustration, ultra-high definition, clean graphic art, highly decorative.
